ValidationRule.description: Display & Mandatory ONLY if EUCategory = UCITS
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), $Permission.PRPRisk = true, RecordType.DeveloperName = 'DesignAndProposal', ISPICKVAL(ForeseenEUCategory__c, 'UCITS'), ISBLANK(TEXT(IsLeveragedUCITS__c )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please provide a value for Is Leveraged UCITS is Foreseen EU Category = UCITS.
